description: Z-bracket (offset mounting bracket) modeled in the XZ plane with a bottom plate, a vertical web, and a top plate.
notes: Ensure proper union of the three components. The vertical web is centered at X=0 (ranging from X=-1.5 to X=1.5) and spans Z=0 to Z=26. The bottom plate extends from X=0 to 30 (Z=0 to 3). The top plate extends from X=-30 to 0 (Z=23 to 26). All components are centered in Y (ranging from Y=-12.5 to 12.5).
